name: Local Inference Worker
description: Downloadable Deno background worker for WebRTC or WebSocket access to loopback OpenAI-compatible local inference endpoints.

capabilities.description: Installable Deno worker package for Windows, Linux, and macOS local inference.
Background bridge for approved local OpenAI-compatible model endpoints.

assets.description: Zipped Deno worker source, compile tasks, and service installer.
Windows x64 worker executable built by CI/CD.
Worker setup, compile, and service installation instructions.

permissions.reason: Maintains WebRTC/WebSocket control channels and fetches user-approved loopback local inference endpoints.
Reads worker configuration from environment variables.
